mapper.select: SELECT * FROM simulation_config WHERE enabled = TRUE AND ( (#{techCode} IS NOT NULL AND #{techCode} <> '' AND tech_code = #{techCode}) OR (#{techCode} IS NOT NULL AND #{techCode} <> '' AND config_key = #{techCode}) OR (#{checkName} IS NOT NULL AND #{checkName} <> '' AND config_key = #{checkName}) OR (#{checkName} IS NOT NULL AND #{checkName} <> '' AND check_name = #{checkName}) OR ( #{checkName} IS NOT NULL AND #{checkName} <> '' AND match_keywords IS NOT NULL AND match_keywords <> '' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM unnest(string_to_array(match_keywords, ',')) AS kw WHERE trim(kw) <> '' AND position(lower(trim(kw)) IN lower(#{checkName})) > 0 ) ) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN #{techCode} IS NOT NULL AND #{techCode} <> '' AND tech_code = #{techCode} THEN 1 WHEN #{techCode} IS NOT NULL AND #{techCode} <> '' AND config_key = #{techCode} THEN 2 WHEN #{checkName} IS NOT NULL AND #{checkName} <> '' AND config_key = #{checkName} THEN 3 WHEN #{checkName} IS NOT NULL AND #{checkName} <> '' AND check_name = #{checkName} THEN 4 ELSE 5 END, id LIMIT 1
